title: blechnum patersonii var. normale
intro: Blechnum patersonii var. normale, also known as Patterson's chain fern or simply chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Blechnum patersonii var. normale is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are said to be effective in relieving various ailments.
